title: Career Discovery Questionnaire
description: Answer these questions to discover your ideal career path

questions.question: When I encounter a technical problem that needs fixing, I feel most comfortable:
options: Writing code or scripts to solve it systematically
Using diagnostic tools and following troubleshooting procedures
Breaking it down into logical steps and testing each part

questions.question: I feel most satisfied when I can:
options: See someone understand a concept they were struggling with
Build something functional that solves a real problem
Complete a project that meets all specifications perfectly
Help someone feel better or recover from an illness
Create something visually appealing or creative

questions.question: When working with numbers and data, I prefer to:
options: Analyze financial records and ensure accuracy
Create visualizations and charts to present insights
Use statistical methods to find patterns
Verify calculations and check for errors

questions.question: In my ideal day, I would spend most of my time:
options: Interacting with people, listening and helping them
Collaborating with a team on a project

questions.question: I work best when I have:
options: Clear procedures and established protocols to follow
Freedom to experiment and try different approaches
Access to the latest tools and technologies
Regular interaction with clients or customers
A structured schedule with predictable routines

questions.question: I feel most confident when I'm:
options: Using specialized knowledge or technical skills
Leading a team or managing a project

questions.question: I prefer tasks that involve:
options: Working with my hands and physical tools

questions.question: In school, I excelled most in subjects that required:
options: Memorization and recall of detailed information
Understanding human behavior and social dynamics

questions.question: My favorite type of assignment was one where I could:
options: Solve complex problems step by step
Research and write about interesting topics
Work with others on a collaborative project
Present my ideas to an audience

questions.question: I was most engaged when learning about:
options: How the human body works and health systems
How structures and systems are built

questions.question: In group projects, I naturally took on the role of:
options: The organizer who keeps everyone on track
The presenter who explains our work
The technical expert who handles complex parts
The supporter who helps everyone contribute

questions.question: I preferred classes that focused on:
My strongest academic abilities were in:
What drives me most in my work is:
options: The opportunity to help and serve others
Making a positive impact on society

questions.question: I feel most fulfilled when:
options: A patient or student shows improvement
I complete a challenging technical project
I achieve a financial or business goal

questions.question: My ideal career would involve:
options: Working directly with people in need

questions.question: I want my work to be remembered for:
options: The teams I've built and led
The accuracy and quality I maintained

questions.question: I value a career that:
I would enjoy spending my day:
options: Teaching and explaining concepts to others
Caring for patients and monitoring their health

questions.question: I find it most engaging to work with:
My ideal task would involve:
options: Fixing or building something with my hands
Solving a complex algorithm or system problem

questions.question: I would be happiest when:
options: A student finally understands a difficult concept

questions.question: I prefer work that requires me to:
I would enjoy a job where I:
options: Interact with customers or clients regularly

questions.question: I would find it rewarding to:
options: Help someone solve a technical problem
See someone succeed because of my guidance
Assist in someone's recovery or treatment
Bring a creative vision to life

questions.question: I prefer tasks that allow me to:
I would enjoy a role where I:
options: Develop and test new software features

questions.question: I approach problems by:
options: Consulting with others who have experience
Breaking it down into smaller, manageable parts
Looking for patterns or similar past cases

questions.question: I solve problems best when I can:
options: Work through them methodically step by step

questions.question: When something goes wrong, my first step is to:
options: Ask for help from someone experienced
Create a plan to prevent it from happening again
